creator: melifaro@ipfw.ru
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/opal3,
>
> Please note that PR ports/140540 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140540
>
>   
* Fix build with CELT codec (thanks to trasz@ )
* Fix DT_SONAME
* Remove IGNORE on libzrtpcpp (ports/140518)
* Bump PORTREVISION

Link: http://static.ipfw.ru/patches/opal366_2.txt
